name: copilot-chat-porter
description: Let GitHub Copilot Chat export and import its own conversation history via natural language

commands.title: Copilot Chat Porter: Export Chat History
Copilot Chat Porter: Import Chat History

languageModelTools.name: exportChatHistory
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Exports the current Copilot Chat session history (all user messages, AI responses, file references, tool calls) as a JSON file. Call this tool when the user asks to save, export, or dump the current conversation/chat history. Optionally copies externally-referenced files (outside the workspace) into a local attachments directory so the export is self-contained and portable. Pass attachmentsDir when the user wants to preserve attached files alongside the export.

outputPath.description: Path to save the exported JSON file. Accepts absolute path or relative path (resolved from workspace root). If omitted, auto-generates a timestamped filename in the workspace root.

attachmentsDir.description: If provided, copies externally-referenced files (outside workspace) into this directory. Relative path only, resolved from the exported JSON file's directory. If omitted, no attachments are copied.

languageModelTools.name: importChatHistory
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Imports and restores a previously exported Copilot Chat session from a JSON file. Call this tool when the user asks to restore, load, or resume a previous conversation from a saved chat history file. The session will be opened in a new chat tab.

inputPath.description: Path to the chat history JSON file to import. Accepts absolute path or relative path (resolved from workspace root).
